'''鈭歞h-sh-s''' ('''dhashasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:starch|starch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-sh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:starch|starch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-sh-s
|-
! Lemma
| dhashasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhashasithi|dhashasithi]] || [[word:dhashasiji|dhashasiji]] || [[word:dhashasishi|dhashasishi]] || [[word:dhashasi|dhashasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhashasuthuth|dhashasuthuth]] || [[word:dhashasujuj|dhashasujuj]] || [[word:dhashasushush|dhashasushush]] || [[word:dhashas|dhashas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhashasuthu|dhashasuthu]] || [[word:dhashasuju|dhashasuju]] || [[word:dhashasushu|dhashasushu]] || [[word:dhashasu|dhashasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhashasufuth|dhashasufuth]] || [[word:dhashasufuj|dhashasufuj]] || [[word:dhashasufush|dhashasufush]] || [[word:dhashasuf|dhashasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhashasethe|dhashasethe]] || [[word:dhashaseje|dhashaseje]] || [[word:dhashaseshe|dhashaseshe]] || [[word:dhashase|dhashase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhashasothoth|dhashasothoth]] || [[word:dhashasojoj|dhashasojoj]] || [[word:dhashasoshosh|dhashasoshosh]] || [[word:dhashas|dhashas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhashasotho|dhashasotho]] || [[word:dhashasojo|dhashasojo]] || [[word:dhashasosho|dhashasosho]] || [[word:dhashaso|dhashaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhashasofoth|dhashasofoth]] || [[word:dhashasofoj|dhashasofoj]] || [[word:dhashasofosh|dhashasofosh]] || [[word:dhashasof|dhashasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhashas忙th忙|dhashas忙th忙]] || [[word:dhashas忙j忙|dhashas忙j忙]] || [[word:dhashas忙sh忙|dhashas忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhashas忙|dhashas忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhashasathath|dhashasathath]] || [[word:dhashasajaj|dhashasajaj]] || [[word:dhashasashash|dhashasashash]] || [[word:dhashas|dhashas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhashasatha|dhashasatha]] || [[word:dhashasaja|dhashasaja]] || [[word:dhashasasha|dhashasasha]] || [[word:dhashasa|dhashasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhashasafath|dhashasafath]] || [[word:dhashasafaj|dhashasafaj]] || [[word:dhashasafash|dhashasafash]] || [[word:dhashasaf|dhashasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhashasasha|dhashasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhashasasha|godhashasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhashasasha|gokidhashasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhashasn眉sha|dhashasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhashasnkn眉sha|godhashasnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhashasn眉sha|gokidhashasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhashash毛sha|dhashash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhashasnksh毛sha|godhashasnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhashash毛sha|gokidhashash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhashasrosha|dhashasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhashasnkrosha|godhashasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhashasrosha|gokidhashasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhashasmusha|dhashasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhashasnkmusha|godhashasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhashasmusha|gokidhashasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhashasherasha|dhashasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhashasnksherasha|godhashasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhashasherasha|gokidhashasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhashasngasha|dhashasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhashasnkngasha|godhashasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhashasngasha|gokidhashasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhashasyasha|dhashasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhashasnkyasha|godhashasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhashasyasha|gokidhashasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhashasyamasha|dhashasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhashasnkyamasha|godhashasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhashasyamasha|gokidhashasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhashasn眉sh毛sha|dhashasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhashasnkn眉sh毛sha|godhashasnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhashasn眉sh毛sha|gokidhashasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhashasn眉rosha|dhashasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhashasnkn眉rosha|godhashasnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhashasn眉rosha|gokidhashasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhashasn眉musha|dhashasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhashasnkn眉musha|godhashasnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhashasn眉musha|gokidhashasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhashash毛n眉sha|dhashash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhashasnksh毛n眉sha|godhashasnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhashash毛n眉sha|gokidhashash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhashash毛rosha|dhashash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhashasnksh毛rosha|godhashasnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhashash毛rosha|gokidhashash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhashash毛musha|dhashash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhashasnksh毛musha|godhashasnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhashash毛musha|gokidhashash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhashasron眉sha|dhashasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhashasnkron眉sha|godhashasnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhashasron眉sha|gokidhashasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhashasrosh毛sha|dhashasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhashasnkrosh毛sha|godhashasnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhashasrosh毛sha|gokidhashasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhashasromusha|dhashasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhashasnkromusha|godhashasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhashasromusha|gokidhashasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhashasmun眉sha|dhashasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhashasnkmun眉sha|godhashasnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhashasmun眉sha|gokidhashasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhashasmush毛sha|dhashasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhashasnkmush毛sha|godhashasnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhashasmush毛sha|gokidhashasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhashasmurosha|dhashasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhashasnkmurosha|godhashasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhashasmurosha|gokidhashasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhashas|dhashas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙sh忙s|dh忙sh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhashas|hodhashas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙sh忙s|hodh忙sh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhashas|hohodhashas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙sh忙s|hohodh忙sh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhashas|n眉dhashas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙sh忙s|n眉dh忙sh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhashas|n眉n眉dhashas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙sh忙s|n眉n眉dh忙sh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhashas|n茂dhashas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙sh忙s|n茂dh忙sh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhashas|n茂n茂dhashas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙sh忙s|n茂n茂dh忙sh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhashas|ludhashas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙sh忙s|ludh忙sh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhashas|luludhashas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙sh忙s|luludh忙sh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhashas|lidhashas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙sh忙s|lidh忙sh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhashas|lilidhashas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙sh忙s|lilidh忙sh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhashas|kodhashas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙sh忙s|kodh忙sh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhashas|kokodhashas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙sh忙s|kokodh忙sh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhashas|kedhashas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙sh忙s|kedh忙sh忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhashas|kekedhashas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙sh忙s|kekedh忙sh忙s]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
